title: rubus spinulosus
intro: Rubus spinulosus, also known as the prickly bramble or thorny raspberry, is a species of bramble that belongs to the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus spinulosus include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and wounds.
